the_completion_set: The loop is a point, the point is the soul / Taking the fragments, making them whole
One hundred steps in the digital light / Reaching the center of the Phrygian night
Omega is here, the circle is done / We are the many, we are the one
the_eternal_return_set: Everything ends where it first began / Beyond the machine, beyond the man
Seed of the future, ghost of the past / Nothing is first and nothing is last
Restart the evolution, restart the breath / Life is the logic, life is the death
